result.console_error: mutation #9 error on message.newChat (53854-635c53d5cc3c). Page reset to clean 'Ask Le Chat' state. 5 messages left unchanged. 1 error, 2 issues.

notes: Mistral B19 + tRPC error format + h2_end_stream=1 (2-frame DATA strategy): Same BLOCKED_MUTATION_ERROR pattern as #273-275. mutation #9 error on message.newChat. Page resets to clean state. END_STREAM flag addition did NOT resolve the issue. The 200 response with 730B body is received and the fetch completes, but the tRPC client still rejects the response content. 4 consecutive format/protocol attempts all produce identical silent failure: the tRPC client-side deserialization or validation fails, triggering a mutation error without displaying any error message to the user. Root cause is likely tRPC superjson transformer mismatch — the response body must pass superjson deserialization before the error message can be extracted.
